PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?college ?collegeLabel WHERE {
  ?college wdt:P31 wd:Q494230 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q11448283 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q1186 ; wdt:P571 ?establishmentDate ; rdfs:label ?collegeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?collegeLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ASC(?establishmentDate)
LIMIT 1
